arts.ttl: Arsenal receive injury boost as Gabriel Magalhaes returns to training ahead of clash with Everton
arts.sum: Arsenal have received a boost on the fitness front, with Gabriel Magalhaes having returned to training ahead of Saturday's game at home to Everton.

arts.ttl: ‘Something could be possible’: Emmanuel Petit says £50m striker would be a great signing for Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal’s search for a new striker has taken them all around the houses in recent years. Indeed, Arsenal have been linked with a number of...

arts.ttl: Kieran Maguire issues verdict on Dan Friedkin appointing former Man United chief Ed Woodward as Everton CEO
Arsenal and Chelsea make contact ‘in recent days’ to sign Brazil rising star – Real Madrid also in the tussle
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea have made contact ‘in recent days’ for Palmeiras youngster Vitor Reis, but face competition from Real Madrid for him. That’s according to the Brazilian edition of GOAL, who report that Arsenal, Chelsea, Real Madrid and Inter Milan all contacted the youngster’s intermediaries in the last few days in ‘search of first information’. The post Arsenal and Chelsea make contact ‘in recent days’ to sign Brazil rising star – Real Madrid also in the tussle appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: ‘Sad’: Martin Keown says Arsene Wenger recently told him something about Arsenal that upset him

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Everton: Mikel Arteta's Premier League title charge could crash and burn against former club
arts.sum: Arsenal's hopes of winning the Premier League title will be over if they suffer defeat to Everton on Saturday, Gunners expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole

arts.ttl: England’s Thomas Tuchel set for interesting response when calling Arsenal star in 2025
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel is set to take over as England’s head coach in 2025 and the German boss told the media on Friday that he will attempt to bring Ben White back into the Three Lions fold. arts.ttl: Arsenal player at centre of legal battle – Dispute escalating and ‘no sign of payment’
arts.sum: Arsenal signed Riccardo Calafiori from Bologna in the summer transfer window. The defender had impressed during the European championships for Italy and in his time at Arsenal, he has made a mark already by scoring once in the Premier League and showing his ability to invert in midfield and help build attacks. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta provides positive Arsenal injury update and discusses January transfer plans
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta confirms that Gabriel Magalhaes is in contention to make his return for the Gunners' Premier League clash with Everton on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Friedkin Group told what manager moves to make after Everton takeover completed
arts.sum: Former Everton defender Richard Dunne has been sharing his thoughts on manager Sean Dyche's future with the Friedkin Group understood to be closing in on their takeover
